name: MitoQ age-related vascular dysfunction registry
summary: Active-not-recruiting phase 2 MitoQ registry for age-related vascular dysfunction, with no posted results.
population: Adults in an age-related vascular dysfunction trial

trial_details.expected_results_window: The registry lists estimated primary completion in Dec. 2025 and study completion in Dec. 2026; no posted results were present in the Jun. 8, 2026 API view.
trial_details.horizon_note: This trial could replicate or limit the smaller MitoQ endothelial-function signal.
trial_details.why_it_matters: Results could clarify whether NAD or redox-restoration programs translate biomarker target engagement into prespecified function, physiology, safety, or disease-boundary outcomes.
